title: Definitions for Foreign spin-offs - Canada.ca
content:
## Definitions for Foreign spin-offs
The actual or deemed cost amount of each share or group of shares that will be used to calculate any capital gain or loss when the shares are sold or disposed of.
The highest dollar value you can get for your property or share in an open and unrestricted market between an informed and willing buyer and an informed and willing seller who are dealing at arm's length with each other.
The country within which a sovereign power can exercise its authority to govern and apply the law.
The corporation that owned the shares of the spin-off corporation and distributed shares of the spin-off corporation to its shareholders.
Common shares of the original corporation.
The corporation that is spun off to the shareholders of the original corporation.
Common shares of the spin-off corporation.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
